tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
  I'm going under and this time I fear there's no one to save me[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]
  This all or nothing really got a way of driving me crazy[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C[/ch]
I need somebody to heal[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]
Somebody to know[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]
Somebody to have[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F[/ch]
Somebody to hold[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]
It's easy to say[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]G[/ch]
But it's never the same[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Am[/ch]                                [ch]F[/ch]
I guess I kinda liked the way you numbed all the pain[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]
Now the day bleeds[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]
Into nightfall[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Am[/ch]
And you're not here[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]F[/ch]
To get me through it all[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]
I let my guard down[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]G[/ch]
And then you pulled the rug[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]F[/ch]
I was getting kinda used to being someone you loved[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
  I'm going under and this time I fear there's no one to turn to[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
  This all or nothing way of loving got me sleeping without you[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]C[/ch]
Now, I need somebody to know[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]
Somebody to heal[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]
Somebody to have[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]F[/ch]
Just to know how it feels[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
It's easy to say but it's never the same[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Am[/ch]                            [ch]F[/ch]
I guess I kinda liked the way you helped me escape[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                  [ch]C[/ch]
Now the day bleeds[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]
Into nightfall[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Am[/ch]
And you're not here[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]F[/ch]
To get me through it all[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C[/ch]
I let my guard down[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]G[/ch]
And then you pulled the rug[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]F[/ch]
I was getting kinda used to being someone you loved[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]    [ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
And I tend to close my eyes when it hurts sometimes[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]Dm[/ch]
I fall into your arms[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]
I'll be safe in your sound till I come back around[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]N.C.                   [ch]C[/ch]
For now the day bleeds[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]
Into nightfall[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Am[/ch]
And you're not here[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]F[/ch]
To get me through it all[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C[/ch]
I let my guard down[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]G[/ch]
And then you pulled the rug[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]F[/ch]
I was getting kinda used to being someone you loved[/tab]

[tab]                       [ch]C[/ch]
But now the day bleeds[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]
Into nightfall[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]
And you're not here[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]F[/ch]
To get me through it all[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C[/ch]
I let my guard down[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]G[/ch]
And then you pulled the rug[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]F[/ch]
I was getting kinda used to being someone you loved[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab]                   [ch]C[/ch]
